role: Grand Ayatollah; Shia philosopher and marja'
bio: Grand Ayatollah Abdollah Javadi Amoli is a prominent Shia scholar, philosopher, and marja' (source of emulation) based in Qom. He was elected to the [Assembly of Experts for the Constitution](/orgs/assembly-of-experts-for-constitution) in 1979 and participated in drafting the Islamic Republic's constitution. A professor at the Qom seminary and a member of the [Society of Seminary Teachers of Qom](/orgs/society-of-seminary-teachers-of-qom), he is known for his extensive works on Islamic philosophy, ethics, and Quranic exegesis. He has also served in the [Assembly of Experts](/orgs/assembly-of-experts) for Leadership. In 1989, he was part of the delegation that delivered [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini)'s message to Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev.
editorial_notes: Born 1933 in Amol. Prolific author and lecturer. Known for the multi-volume Tafsir Tasnim. Delivered Khomeini's letter to Gorbachev in January 1989.
